ChangeState.description:
Node-level diff overlay.

Computed by overlaying the unified diff on the AST: a node is `added` if it
appears only at head_sha, `removed` if only at base_sha, `modified` if any
hunk overlaps its line range, otherwise `unchanged`.
ChangeState.title: ChangeState

Confidence.description:
Provenance / certainty of the node or edge.

`exact`        — derived directly from tree-sitter AST or stack-graphs/SCIP semantic resolution.
`ambiguous`    — multiple candidates resolved by name; pick is heuristic. UI should badge.
`llm_inferred` — produced by --llm-enrich. UI must badge distinctly; not authoritative.
Confidence.title: Confidence

Diagnostic.description:
Non-fatal warning emitted during graph construction.

Used to surface stack-graphs misses, ripgrep ambiguities, schema invariant
violations, and any LLM enrichment failures. Reviewer-visible.

related_node_ids.description: Node IDs this diagnostic refers to. Empty for global diagnostics.
related_node_ids.title: Related Node Ids

Diagnostic.title: Diagnostic

Edge.description:
Typed directed edge between two nodes.

Allowed source/target kind combinations are constrained by `EdgeType` semantics
(see EdgeType docstring). The Graph-level invariant check enforces them at emit.

change_state.description: Edge-level diff overlay. An edge is `added` if it exists only at head_sha, `removed` if only at base_sha, `unchanged` otherwise.

note.description: Free-text annotation. Especially used for llm_inferred edges to record reasoning.
note.title: Note

Edge.title: Edge

EdgeType.description:
Typed, directed edge.

Allowed source/target kinds per type:
    contains:    Module->File, File->Symbol, File->Hunk
    defines:     Hunk->Symbol  (this hunk creates or modifies the symbol's signature)
    touches:     Hunk->Symbol  (this hunk overlaps body, no signature change)
    calls:       Symbol->Symbol
    references:  Symbol->Symbol  (non-call: type usage, identifier read, attribute access)
    imports:     File->Symbol or File->Module
    covers:      Symbol(symbol_kind=test)->Symbol
    external:    Symbol->ExternalRef
EdgeType.title: EdgeType

ExternalRefKind.description:
Category of an external (out-of-repo) reference.

Used for things the call graph cannot resolve symbolically because they live
outside the codebase (database, network) but are still load-bearing for review.
ExternalRefKind.title: ExternalRefKind

ExternalRefNode.description: A reference to a resource outside the codebase (DB table, HTTP route, etc.).

id.description: Globally unique within this graph. Format: '<kind>:<stable-key>'.
id.title: Id

confidence.description: How certain the resolver is about this node's existence/identity.

change_state.description: Diff overlay state of this node.

detail.description: Optional structured detail. For db_table: JSON path or column expression used. For http_route: handler module. Free-form.
detail.title: Detail

ExternalRefNode.title: ExternalRefNode

FileNode.description: A source file at head_sha (or base_sha if removed).

id.description: Globally unique within this graph. Format: '<kind>:<stable-key>'.
id.title: Id

confidence.description: How certain the resolver is about this node's existence/identity.

change_state.description: Diff overlay state of this node.

generated.description: True if classified as generated/codegen (proto-gen, openapi, lockfile, snapshot). Generated files should be collapsed in UIs by default.
generated.title: Generated

FileNode.title: FileNode

HunkChangeType.description: Hunk-level diff direction. A hunk is the smallest atomic edit unit in a unified diff.
HunkChangeType.title: HunkChangeType

HunkNode.description: A contiguous diff region within a single file. The atomic unit of change.

id.description: Globally unique within this graph. Format: '<kind>:<stable-key>'.
id.title: Id

confidence.description: How certain the resolver is about this node's existence/identity.

change_state.description: Diff overlay state of this node.

file_id.description: ID of the FileNode this hunk lives in.
file_id.title: File Id

line_range.description: Lines at head_sha (or base_sha for removed-only hunks).

patch.description: Unified-diff fragment for this hunk: '@@' header plus +/-/' ' lines.
patch.title: Patch

HunkNode.title: HunkNode

LineRange.description: Inclusive 1-indexed line range in a file at a given SHA.
LineRange.title: LineRange

ModuleNode.description: A logical module — a directory containing source files belonging to one unit.

id.description: Globally unique within this graph. Format: '<kind>:<stable-key>'.
id.title: Id

confidence.description: How certain the resolver is about this node's existence/identity.

change_state.description: Diff overlay state of this node.

path.description: Repo-relative directory path of the module root.
path.title: Path

ModuleNode.title: ModuleNode

PRMetadata.description:
Identifying info for the PR the graph was built from.

Captures everything needed to reproduce the parse: repo, base/head SHAs,
branch names, plus surface metadata for UI display.

additions.description: Total lines added across all files.
additions.title: Additions

deletions.description: Total lines removed across all files.
deletions.title: Deletions

changed_files.description: Total file count touched by the PR.
changed_files.title: Changed Files

PRMetadata.title: PRMetadata

SymbolKind.description: Sub-kind of a Symbol node. The reviewer-visible classification of a definition.
SymbolKind.title: SymbolKind

SymbolNode.description: A named, addressable definition: function, method, class, type, const, or test.

id.description: Globally unique within this graph. Format: '<kind>:<stable-key>'.
id.title: Id

confidence.description: How certain the resolver is about this node's existence/identity.

change_state.description: Diff overlay state of this node.

file_id.description: ID of the FileNode containing this symbol.
file_id.title: File Id

line_range.description: Lines in head_sha where the symbol's definition lives (or base_sha if removed).

signature.description: One-line signature when extractable (e.g. 'def foo(a: int) -> str:').
signature.title: Signature

public.description: Heuristic: not '_'-prefixed; in __all__; appears in proto/openapi/IDL; or referenced from outside its declaring module.
public.title: Public

SymbolNode.title: SymbolNode

description:
Complete impact graph for one PR. Versioned root document.

Backwards-compatibility: bump `schema_version` on any breaking change.
Downstream consumers should pin to a major version range.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema. Bump on breaking change.
schema_version.title: Schema Version

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the graph was emitted.
generated_at.title: Generated At

llm_enrichment_used.description: True iff at least one node/edge has confidence=llm_inferred.
llm_enrichment_used.title: Llm Enrichment Used

title: Graph
